channel.title: VulnCheck — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by VulnCheck (vulncheck).

item.title: CVE-2026-49954 · 8.6 HIGH — Discuz! X5.0 Local File Inclusion via enable_disable.php Plugin Directory
item.description: Discuz! X5.0 releases 20260320 through 20260610 contain a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows authenticated administrators to execute arbitrary code by importing a specially crafted plugin configuration containing path traversal sequences…

item.title: CVE-2026-49953 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Discuz! X5.0 CAPTCHA Bypass via Predictable Character Set
item.description: Discuz! X5.0 releases 20260320 through 20260610 contains a CAPTCHA bypass vulnerability that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to defeat challenge controls by exploiting limited complexity and predictable character sets in generated CAPTCHA ima…

item.title: CVE-2026-49952 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Discuz! X5.0 Authentication Bypass via dbbak.php Encryption Oracle
item.description: Discuz! X5.0 releases 20260320 through 20260501 contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to database backup and restore functionality by exploiting a shared cryptographic…

item.title: CVE-2016-20068 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Booking Calendar Contact Form 1.0.23 SQL Injection
item.description: WordPress Booking Calendar Contact Form version 1.0.23 contains an unauthenticated blind SQL injection vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the 'id' parameter. Attackers can s…

item.title: CVE-2019-25746 · 7.1 HIGH — WordPress Sliced Invoices 3.8.2 SQL Injection via post Parameter
item.description: WordPress Sliced Invoices 3.8.2 contains an authenticated SQL injection vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the 'post' parameter. Attackers can send requests to the admin.php…

item.title: CVE-2018-25437 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ 👻 — WordPress CherryFramework Themes 3.1.4 Backup File Download
item.description: WordPress CherryFramework Themes 3.1.4 contains an information disclosure vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to download sensitive backup files by accessing the download_backup.php endpoint. Attackers can directly access the download…

item.title: CVE-2018-25436 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Plugin Baggage Freight Shipping Australia 0.1.0 Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: WordPress Plugin Baggage Freight Shipping Australia 0.1.0 contains an unrestricted file upload vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files by exploiting the upload-package.php endpoint. Attackers can submit POST requ…

item.title: CVE-2016-20084 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress appointment-booking-calendar 1.1.24 Privilege Escalation XSS
item.description: WordPress appointment-booking-calendar 1.1.24 contains multiple privilege escalation vulnerabilities that allow unauthenticated attackers to modify calendar settings and inject persistent cross-site scripting payloads through the admin.php page param…

item.title: CVE-2016-20083 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ 👻 — WordPress More Fields Plugin 2.1 Cross-Site Request Forgery
item.description: WordPress More Fields Plugin 2.1 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to perform unauthorized actions by disabling CSRF token validation. Attackers can craft malicious web pages that trick logged-in administrators…

item.title: CVE-2016-20082 · 6.9 MEDIUM 👻 — WordPress Plugin Abtest Local File Inclusion via abtest_admin.php
item.description: WordPress Plugin Abtest contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to include arbitrary files by manipulating the action parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to abtest_admin.php with malicious action val…

item.title: CVE-2016-20081 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ 👻 — WordPress Plugin HB Audio Gallery Lite 1.0.0 Path Traversal File Download
item.description: WordPress Plugin HB Audio Gallery Lite 1.0.0 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to download arbitrary files by manipulating the file_path parameter. Attackers can send requests to the audio-download.php endp…

item.title: CVE-2016-20080 · 6.9 MEDIUM 👻 — WordPress Brandfolder Plugin 3.0 Local File Inclusion via callback.php
item.description: WordPress Brandfolder plugin version 3.0 and earlier contains a local file inclusion vulnerability in callback.php that allows unauthenticated attackers to include arbitrary files by manipulating the wp_abspath parameter. Attackers can supply path tr…

item.title: CVE-2016-20079 · 6.9 MEDIUM 👻 — WordPress Dharma Booking 2.28.3 Local File Inclusion via proccess.php
item.description: WordPress Dharma Booking 2.28.3 and earlier contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to include arbitrary files by manipulating the gateway parameter. Attackers can supply file paths with directory traversal…

item.title: CVE-2016-20078 · 6.9 MEDIUM 👻 — WordPress IMDb Profile Widget 1.0.8 Local File Inclusion via pic.php
item.description: WordPress IMDb Profile Widget 1.0.8 contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by manipulating the url parameter. Attackers can supply directory traversal sequences in GET requests to p…

item.title: CVE-2016-20077 · 6.9 MEDIUM 👻 — WordPress Plugin Photocart Link 1.6 Local File Inclusion via decode.php
item.description: WordPress Plugin Photocart Link 1.6 contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by exploiting insufficient input validation in decode.php. Attackers can supply base64-encoded file paths…

item.title: CVE-2016-20076 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Simple-Backup 2.7.11 Arbitrary File Deletion and Download
item.description: WordPress Simple-Backup 2.7.11 contains multiple vulnerabilities that allow unauthenticated attackers to delete arbitrary files and download sensitive files by manipulating the delete_backup_file and download_backup_file parameters in tools.php. Atta…

item.title: CVE-2016-20075 · 8.8 HIGH — WordPress Ultimate Product Catalog 3.8.6 Arbitrary File Upload RCE
item.description: WordPress Ultimate Product Catalog 3.8.6 contains an arbitrary file upload vulnerability that allows authenticated users with contributor, editor, author, or administrator roles to upload malicious files by exploiting the custom fields functionality.…

item.title: CVE-2016-20074 · 5.3 MEDIUM 👻 — WordPress Lazy Content Slider Plugin 3.4 CSRF
item.description: WordPress Lazy Content Slider Plugin 3.4 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to perform unauthorized actions by crafting malicious HTML forms. Attackers can trick authenticated administrators into submitting POST…

item.title: CVE-2016-20073 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ 👻 — Answer My Question 1.3 Plugin WordPress SQL Injection via modal.php
item.description: Answer My Question 1.3 plugin for WordPress contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the 'id' POST parameter. Attackers can submit crafted SQL s…

item.title: CVE-2016-20072 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ 👻 — BBS e-Franchise 1.1.1 WordPress Plugin SQL Injection via uid
item.description: BBS e-Franchise 1.1.1 plugin for WordPress contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the uid parameter. Attackers can craft requests to pages usi…

item.title: CVE-2016-20071 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ 👻 — WordPress 404 Redirection Manager Plugin 1.0 SQL Injection
item.description: The 404 Redirection Manager plugin version 1.0 for WordPress contains an unauthenticated SQL injection vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through unsanitized user input. Attackers c…

item.title: CVE-2016-20070 · 6.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Booking Calendar Contact Form 1.0.23 Privilege Escalation Stored XSS
item.description: WordPress Booking Calendar Contact Form 1.0.23 contains privilege escalation and stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities that allow authenticated users to modify plugin options and inject malicious scripts by failing to verify user privileges and…

item.title: CVE-2016-20069 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Booking Calendar Contact Form 1.0.23 SQL Injection
item.description: WordPress Booking Calendar Contact Form 1.0.23 contains an unauthenticated blind SQL injection vulnerability in the shortcode function that fails to sanitize the calendar parameter before using it in database queries. Attackers can inject SQL command…

item.title: CVE-2016-20067 · 5.3 MEDIUM — WordPress CP Polls 1.0.8 Cross-Site Request Forgery
item.description: WordPress CP Polls 1.0.8 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to perform unauthorized actions on behalf of authenticated users. Attackers can craft malicious HTML pages that execute unwanted poll operations when a…

item.title: CVE-2016-20066 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress CP Polls 1.0.8 Persistent Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: WordPress CP Polls 1.0.8 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts through unsanitized file upload functionality. Attackers can upload files containing script payloads with event handle…

item.title: CVE-2026-53868 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Capgo < 12.128.2 - Denial of Service via Unverified Email Account Registration and Deletion
item.description: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains a denial of service vulnerability allowing attackers to register accounts using arbitrary email addresses without verification, then initiate deletion to lock emails in pending deletion state. Attackers can permanently…

item.title: CVE-2026-53867 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Capgo < 12.128.2 - Orphaned File Retention via Profile Image Replacement
item.description: Capgo before 12.128.2 fails to delete previously uploaded profile images from backend storage when users replace or remove them. Attackers can access orphaned image files through previously generated URLs, allowing unauthorized retrieval of user-uplo…

item.title: CVE-2026-53839 · 6.5 MEDIUM — OpenClaw < 2026.5.7 - Hostname Prefix Matching Bypass in Trusted Retry Endpoint Validation
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.7 contains a hostname validation vulnerability in retry endpoint checks that allows matching hostname prefixes instead of exact hostnames. Attackers can exploit this by crafting a hostname prefix resembling a trusted host to se…

item.title: CVE-2026-53838 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OpenClaw < 2026.5.27 - Node Pairing State Mutation via Reconnection
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.27 contains a state mutation vulnerability in node pairing reconnection that allows paired nodes to confuse approval scope decisions. Attackers can exploit reconnection logic to restore or present broader node authority than in…

item.title: CVE-2026-53837 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — OpenClaw < 2026.5.6 - Missing Channel Type Validation in Mattermost Event Handlers
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.6 contains an improper access control vulnerability in Mattermost event handlers that fails to validate channel type metadata. Attackers can bypass intended DM policy decisions by sending crafted Mattermost events missing chann…

item.title: CVE-2026-53836 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.12 - Allowlist Bypass via PowerShell Encoded-Command Aliases
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.12 contains an allowlist bypass vulnerability in PowerShell encoded-command handling that allows attackers to execute encoded commands using abbreviated flag aliases not recognized by the allowlist parser. Remote authenticated…

item.title: CVE-2026-53835 · 4.3 MEDIUM — OpenClaw < 2026.5.6 - Config-Write Enforcement Bypass in Feishu Dynamic-Agent Bindings
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.6 contains a configuration enforcement bypass vulnerability in Feishu dynamic-agent bindings that allows authenticated senders to create or update bindings without honoring configured config-write controls. Attackers can exploi…

item.title: CVE-2026-53834 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — OpenClaw < 2026.4.27 - Authorization Bypass in QQBot Pre-dispatch Slash Commands
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.4.27 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in QQBot pre-dispatch slash commands that allows authenticated senders to skip allowFrom policy checks. Attackers can invoke slash commands before configured access control poli…

item.title: CVE-2026-53833 · 7.7 HIGH — QQBot for OpenClaw < 2026.4.29 - Authorization Bypass via QQBot Streaming Command
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.4.29 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in the QQBot streaming command that allows authenticated senders to mutate configuration without explicit allowFrom restrictions. Attackers can modify QQBot streaming configurat…

item.title: CVE-2026-53832 · 7.7 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.18 - Identity Header Forgery via Trusted-Proxy Configuration
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.18 contains an identity header validation vulnerability allowing local same-host callers to forge trusted-proxy identity headers. Attackers with access to the proxy-facing Gateway port can supply forged identity headers to assu…

item.title: CVE-2026-53831 · 8.3 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.18 - Arbitrary File Read via Shell Expansion in system.run Safe-bin Allowlist
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.18 contains a policy enforcement vulnerability in system.run safe-bin allowlist validation that allows shell expansion to modify command interpretation on POSIX nodes. Authenticated operators can exploit shell metacharacters in…

item.title: CVE-2026-53830 · 6.5 MEDIUM — OpenClaw < 2026.4.22 - Webhook Secret Revocation Bypass via secrets.reload
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.4.22 contains a webhook secret revocation bypass vulnerability allowing callers with old Slack and Zalo webhook secrets to remain active after secrets.reload. Attackers can exploit the stale-secret window to deliver webhook event…

item.title: CVE-2026-53829 · 8.5 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.18 - Command Truncation in Exec Approval Display
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.18 contains an approval display truncation vulnerability allowing authenticated users to hide command suffixes from approvers. Attackers can submit oversized exec commands with benign prefixes and malicious suffixes to execute…

item.title: CVE-2026-53828 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.6 - Native Command Authorization Bypass via Owner-Command Enforcement
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.6 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in native command handling that allows authenticated senders to execute owner-only commands without proper policy enforcement. Attackers can trigger native command handling to by…

item.title: CVE-2026-53827 · 6.5 MEDIUM — OpenClaw < 2026.5.2 - Credential Exposure via Model-Supplied Loopback URLs in message.action Forwarding
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.2 contains a credential exposure vulnerability in message.action forwarding that allows model-controlled metadata to forward action payloads with Gateway credentials to attacker-supplied loopback URLs. Remote attackers can inte…

item.title: CVE-2026-53826 · 4.3 MEDIUM — OpenClaw < 2026.4.26 - Information Disclosure via Sandboxed Session Spawn
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.4.26 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in sandboxed session spawning that exposes the real workspace path to child prompts. Attackers can exploit this by spawning child sessions from sandboxed parents to reveal hos…

item.title: CVE-2026-53825 · 7.1 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.4.7 - Arbitrary Local File Read via memory-wiki Ingest with operator.write Scope
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.4.7 contains an arbitrary file read vulnerability in the memory-wiki ingest feature that allows authenticated Gateway operators with operator.write scope to read local files outside intended ingest sources. Attackers with operato…

item.title: CVE-2026-53824 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Mattermost plugin for OpenClaw < 2026.4.24 - Slash Token Revocation Lag via Monitor Refresh Delay
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.4.24 contains a token revocation vulnerability allowing callers with revoked slash tokens to continue executing commands during monitor refresh windows. Attackers can exploit stale token acceptance to invoke slash command behavio…

item.title: CVE-2026-53823 · 8.6 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.3 - Privilege Escalation via Mutable Slack Display Names in allowFrom
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.3 contains a privilege escalation vulnerability in the allowFrom feature that binds to mutable Slack display names. Attackers with Slack account access can change display name metadata to match policy entries, potentially gaini…

item.title: CVE-2026-53822 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.18 - Command Argument Modification via Shell Wrapper Between Approval and Execution
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.18 contains a command injection vulnerability where shell wrapper argv could change between approval and execution. Attackers can rebuild command arguments after allowlist approval to execute unapproved command shapes, potentia…

item.title: CVE-2026-53821 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.5.18 - Scope Elevation in trusted-proxy Control UI WebSocket
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.18 accepts WebSocket client-declared operator scopes before binding to server-approved pairing or trusted-proxy authorization baseline. Unpaired or restricted trusted-proxy Control UI clients can obtain cached operator.admin au…

item.title: CVE-2026-53820 · 6.9 MEDIUM — OpenClaw < 2026.5.12 - Exec Denylist Bypass in Bundle MCP Loopback Session Spawn
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.5.12 contains an exec denylist bypass vulnerability in the bundle MCP loopback session-spawn path that allows authenticated callers to bypass intended command restrictions. Attackers can reach the affected bundled MCP session-spa…

item.title: CVE-2026-48558 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass via Missing OIDC JWT Signature Verification
item.description: SimpleHelp versions 5.5.15 and prior and 6.0 pre-release versions contain an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without veri…

item.title: CVE-2026-53982 · 7.1 HIGH — Cap-go Console < 12.28.2 Account Deletion DoS via Device Identifier Association
item.description: Cap-go Console < 12.28.2 contains a denial-of-service vulnerability in its account deletion flow that allows an attacker to block authentication and onboarding functions by triggering account deletion while a device identifier is linked to the active…

item.title: CVE-2026-53981 · 7.6 HIGH — Cap-go < v12.128.2 Account Takeover via Unauthenticated Email Change Mechanism
item.description: Cap-go prior to 12.128.2 contains an account takeover vulnerability in its email change mechanism that allows an attacker with temporary authenticated session access to change the registered email address without re-authentication such as password or…
